'''''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 18''' was published in March [[1979]] by [[Paradise Press]]. This was the last issue.

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*"The Empire Gets Closer", by [[John May]]: another preview of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']], with information on filming in [[Finse]], Norway and the casting of [[Billy Dee Williams]] as [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]].
*"[[Joe Johnston]]—The Sketch Book Wizard", by [[Michael Marten|Dr. M. F. Marten]]: a profile of the artist who produced conceptual and technical drawings for [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyers]], the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]], and other material found in the ''[[The Star Wars Sketchbook]]''.
*"The Secret [[List of planets/Legends|Planets]]," by [[John Chesterman]]: speculation on the sort of planets the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] might use to hide from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]].
